SEARCH
Package com.mps.deepviolet.util

Class OcspClient

java.lang.Object
com.mps.deepviolet.util.OcspClient
public class OcspClient extends Object
OCSP client implementation using JDK classes, replacing Bouncy Castle. Builds OCSP requests, sends them to responders, and parses responses.
Author:
Milton Smith

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    OcspClient.OcspResponse

    static enum

  • Constructor Details

    • OcspClient

      public OcspClient()
      Create a new OCSP client with default settings.

  • Method Details

    • setTimeoutMs

      public void setTimeoutMs(int timeoutMs)
      Set the network timeout in milliseconds.

    • check

      public OcspClient.OcspResponse check(X509Certificate cert, X509Certificate issuer)
      Check the revocation status of a certificate using OCSP.
      Parameters:
      cert - The certificate to check
      issuer - The issuer certificate
      Returns:
      The OCSP response, or null if the check failed

    • check

      public OcspClient.OcspResponse check(X509Certificate cert, X509Certificate issuer, String ocspUrl)
      Check the revocation status of a certificate using a specific OCSP URL.
      Parameters:
      cert - The certificate to check
      issuer - The issuer certificate
      ocspUrl - The OCSP responder URL
      Returns:
      The OCSP response
